description: Full coverage of QC Scanner: session lifecycle, scanning modes, pallet management, weight, completion

results.name: Session created with correct facilityId and status
Scan items seeded with correct expectedQty and caseAmount
results.detail: K18-SEED-A: exp=72 case=36 wt=15.700. K18-SEED-B: exp=24

results.name: Unit scan: adds exactly 1 unit, not caseAmount
Case scan: adds caseAmount units, hard-capped at expectedQty
Over-scan blocked: scannedQty cannot exceed expectedQty
Partial case entry: validates qty <= remaining, rejects over-count
Pallet items JSON valid and matches scanned quantities
Weight calculation uses Math.ceil (rounds UP to nearest whole pound)
Session completion: status=complete, completedAt set, all items at 100%
Reopen: session returns to scanning, all data preserved
MU all-zero blocked: fully allocated MU returns allZeroBlocked flag
results.detail: Old behavior would have scanned 74 units. New behavior blocks with allZeroBlocked=true
results.warning: This test verifies the regression fix for order 3513284 (MU 198463 scanning 285 instead of 66)

results.name: Facility address map covers all active warehouses (2=Columbus, 3=Reno, 4=Calgary, 5=Mississauga, 1=Toronto)
results.detail: 0 sessions with unknown facilityId, 66 sessions with null facilityId (scanning)
results.warning: 66 active sessions have null facilityId — pallet labels will fail for these orders

results.name: Concurrent scans do not corrupt scannedQty (race condition protection)
results.detail: After 5 concurrent scans each: RACE-A=5, RACE-B=5, RACE-C=5

results.name: Session cleanup: deleting session removes all items and pallets
Recent sessions query returns data within acceptable time (<2s)
